title: China-to-UK Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
target_market: United Kingdom (UKCA or CE accepted in Great Britain)
provenance: AI-compiled, multi-model cross-checked, not human-verified. Informational only; confirm with the official regulator and a qualified professional. Not legal/certification/customs/market-access advice.

rows.requirement: Electrical Safety and UK EESR Boundary
rows.target_requirement: The Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016 apply to electrical equipment designed for use within the UK voltage limits. Many mains-powered power tools, chargers, and power supplies need EESR analysis in addition to machinery safety. Battery-only low-voltage tools may fall outside the voltage scope, but their chargers and adapters commonly remain in scope. UK designated BS EN standards are voluntary presumption routes.
target_standards: BS EN 62841 series [voluntary UK designated standard route]
Relevant BS EN charger or power-supply standards [voluntary UK designated standard route]
rows.china_equivalent: China files often use GB 3883 series for tool safety and separate charger standards where applicable. These reports should be mapped to UK essential safety objectives and machinery requirements rather than treated as automatic UKCA or accepted CE evidence.
china_standards: China charger safety standards where applicable
rows.gap: The common gap is incomplete scope separation between the tool, battery pack, charger, and external power supply. UK documentation should identify which parts are in EESR scope, which are handled under machinery safety, and which standards were used voluntarily to support the conformity claim.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation for in-scope electrical equipment: Electrical Equipment (Safety) Regulations 2016. BS EN 62841 and other UK designated standards remain voluntary presumption routes.
target.zh: 适用电气设备的强制法律义务：《2016年电气设备（安全）法规》。BS EN 62841 及其他英国指定标准仍为自愿符合性推定路径。
target.zht: 適用電氣設備的強制法律義務：《2016年電氣設備（安全）法規》。BS EN 62841 及其他英國指定標準仍為自願符合性推定路徑。

cn.en: China domestic evidence commonly uses GB 3883 series and charger-specific standards where applicable.
cn.zh: 中国境内证据通常采用 GB 3883 系列及适用的充电器专项标准。
cn.zht: 中國境內證據通常採用 GB 3883 系列及適用的充電器專項標準。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Conditionally non-compliant until the UK file separates EESR-scope electrical equipment from machinery-scope tool hazards and supports each part with appropriate conformity evidence. GB 3883 alone is not a substitute for EESR assessment.

rows.target_requirement: The Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 are mandatory for in-scope apparatus, including many motor-driven tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies. The product must not generate excessive electromagnetic disturbance and must have adequate immunity. UK designated EMC standards are voluntary routes to presumption of conformity.
target_standards: Relevant UK designated BS EN EMC standards [voluntary presumption route]
rows.china_equivalent: China compliance packages may include EMC reports alongside GB 3883 safety reports. Test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and UK declaration wording still need UK-specific review.
china_standards: China EMC standards and test reports where applicable
rows.gap: A frequent UK gap is a report that tests only the bare tool but omits the charger, battery pack, electronic controller variants, or worst-case load conditions. The UK technical file should show the exact marketed configuration and justify representative-model coverage.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 for in-scope apparatus. UK designated EMC standards are voluntary and should not be described as mandatory.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：适用设备须符合《2016年电磁兼容法规》。英国指定 EMC 标准为自愿标准，不应描述为强制要求。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：適用設備須符合《2016年電磁相容法規》。英國指定 EMC 標準為自願標準，不應描述為強制要求。

cn.en: China domestic files may include EMC evidence, but UK acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, and declaration mapping.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含 EMC 证据，但英国接受性取决于范围、限值、配置和声明映射。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含 EMC 證據，但英國接受性取決於範圍、限值、配置和聲明映射。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Not UK-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual Great Britain-marketed tool system and is tied to the Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 in the technical documentation and declaration of conformity.

rows.requirement: UKCA or CE Market Access Under UK Machinery Law
rows.target_requirement: Electric and cordless power tools are commonly machinery when placed on the Great Britain market. The Supply of Machinery (Safety) Regulations 2008 are mandatory. Current GOV.UK guidance states that Great Britain continues to recognise CE marking for many product regulations, including machinery, alongside UKCA where UK requirements remain aligned. UK designated standards and recognised EU harmonised standards can support presumption of conformity, but BS EN 62841 and EN 62841 are voluntary routes and are not themselves mandatory legal obligations.
target_standards: Product Safety and Metrology (Amendment) Regulations 2024 (SI 2024/696) and GOV.UK UKCA/CE guidance
BS EN 62841 series [voluntary UK designated standard route]
EN 62841 series [voluntary harmonised standard route where CE route is used]
rows.china_equivalent: China power-tool safety files commonly reference the GB 3883 series for hand-held motor-operated electric tools, transportable tools, and lawn and garden machinery. GB 3883 evidence does not replace the UK declaration of conformity, technical documentation, risk assessment, UKCA or accepted CE marking obligations, or Great Britain importer traceability duties.
rows.gap: A China domestic safety report is not enough for Great Britain placement. The importer needs a UK or accepted CE conformity route, correct declaration, technical file, machinery risk assessment, instructions, marking, and traceability information mapped to the Supply of Machinery (Safety) Regulations 2008 and current UKCA or CE recognition policy.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: Supply of Machinery (Safety) Regulations 2008 for in-scope machinery. UKCA or accepted CE marking must be supported by the correct conformity process. BS EN 62841 and EN 62841 are voluntary and are not themselves mandatory.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：适用机械须符合《2008年机械供应（安全）法规》。UKCA 或被接受的 CE 标志必须由正确合格评定程序支持。BS EN 62841 和 EN 62841 为自愿标准，本身不是强制要求。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：適用機械須符合《2008年機械供應（安全）法規》。UKCA 或被接受的 CE 標誌必須由正確合格評定程序支援。BS EN 62841 和 EN 62841 為自願標準，本身不是強制要求。

cn.en: Mandatory China domestic baseline commonly uses GB 3883 series for in-scope power tools.
cn.zh: 中国境内强制基线通常对适用电动工具采用 GB 3883 系列。
cn.zht: 中國境內強制基線通常對適用電動工具採用 GB 3883 系列。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Not UK-ready as-is if the product file only contains GB 3883 evidence. Great Britain machinery documentation, declaration, marking, and traceability are required; BS EN 62841 can support the file but cannot be labelled mandatory.

source.publisher: GOV.UK / Department for Business and Trade

rows.requirement: Outdoor Noise Emissions for Listed Equipment
rows.target_requirement: The Noise Emission in the Environment by Equipment for Use Outdoors Regulations 2001 are mandatory for outdoor equipment listed in scope, which can include certain garden and construction-type power tools. The regulations require noise marking and conformity assessment, and some equipment categories have noise limits or approved-body involvement. This obligation is separate from general machinery safety and UKCA or accepted CE documentation.
target_standards: Noise Emission in the Environment by Equipment for Use Outdoors Regulations 2001 (SI 2001/1701)
Relevant noise measurement standards [voluntary technical route where cited]
rows.china_equivalent: China GB 3883 safety evidence usually focuses on electrical and mechanical hazards and may not include UK outdoor-noise marking, guaranteed sound-power level, category classification, or approved-body path.
china_standards: China domestic noise standards where applicable
rows.gap: Outdoor-use tools need category screening against the UK outdoor-noise regulations. If listed, the UK file must add the correct noise procedure, declared or guaranteed sound-power level, marking, and any required approved-body evidence.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation for listed outdoor equipment: Noise Emission in the Environment by Equipment for Use Outdoors Regulations 2001. Noise test standards are technical routes and are not standalone mandatory legal acts.
target.zh: 列名户外设备的强制法律义务：《2001年户外使用设备环境噪声排放法规》。噪声测试标准是技术路径，并非独立强制法律文件。
target.zht: 列名戶外設備的強制法律義務：《2001年戶外使用設備環境噪聲排放法規》。噪聲測試標準是技術路徑，並非獨立強制法律文件。

cn.en: GB 3883 safety evidence does not automatically cover UK outdoor-noise obligations.
cn.zh: GB 3883 安全证据不会自动覆盖英国户外噪声义务。
cn.zht: GB 3883 安全證據不會自動覆蓋英國戶外噪聲義務。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Potentially non-compliant for outdoor listed equipment unless UK outdoor-noise screening and any required noise marking, measurement, and conformity assessment are added to the UK file.

rows.target_requirement: The Restriction of the Use of Certain Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Equipment Regulations 2012 restrict hazardous substances in electrical and electronic equipment placed on the UK market. Power tools, chargers, and electronic accessories need UK RoHS technical documentation and declaration coverage for restricted substances, exemptions, and supply-chain material evidence.
target_standards: Restriction of the Use of Certain Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Equipment Regulations 2012 (SI 2012/3032)
BS EN IEC 63000 [voluntary technical documentation route]
rows.china_equivalent: China RoHS and GB 3883 evidence can support material and safety review, but UK RoHS requires UK-format documentation and declaration mapping to the 2012 RoHS Regulations.
rows.gap: The UK gap is usually material-traceability evidence rather than tool performance testing: homogeneous-material declarations, supplier controls, exemption logic, and UK declaration wording must be in place.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation: UK RoHS Regulations 2012. BS EN IEC 63000 is a voluntary technical documentation route.
target.zh: 强制法律义务：英国《2012年 RoHS 法规》。BS EN IEC 63000 是自愿技术文件路径。
target.zht: 強制法律義務：英國《2012年 RoHS 法規》。BS EN IEC 63000 是自願技術文件路徑。

cn.en: China RoHS or GB 3883 evidence does not automatically satisfy UK RoHS documentation.
cn.zh: 中国 RoHS 或 GB 3883 证据不会自动满足英国 RoHS 文件要求。
cn.zht: 中國 RoHS 或 GB 3883 證據不會自動滿足英國 RoHS 文件要求。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Not UK-ready until the RoHS file supports the UK RoHS Regulations 2012 with material evidence, exemption review, and declaration coverage for the actual tool, charger, and accessories.

rows.target_requirement: Battery packs supplied with cordless tools need battery-level UK compliance in addition to tool-level machinery, electrical, EMC, and RoHS compliance. The Batteries and Accumulators (Placing on the Market) Regulations 2008 control placing batteries on the UK market, including substance restrictions and marking obligations. Other battery waste and producer responsibility obligations may also apply to the UK importer or producer. Battery safety evidence and standards are technical routes; the mandatory duties come from the regulations.
target_standards: Batteries and Accumulators (Placing on the Market) Regulations 2008 (SI 2008/2164)
Battery safety standards and transport evidence [voluntary technical evidence routes where applicable]
rows.china_equivalent: China tool files often treat the battery pack as an accessory tested with the tool under GB 3883 or under separate lithium-battery transport and safety evidence. UK battery placing-on-market duties attach to the battery placed on the UK market and are not replaced by GB 3883 evidence.
china_standards: China lithium battery safety and transport evidence where applicable
rows.gap: Cordless tools need battery-level UK compliance in addition to tool-level UKCA or accepted CE compliance. A battery pack that passes China domestic or transport tests may still need UK battery marking, substance review, producer responsibility checks, safety documentation, and importer obligations.

target.en: Mandatory legal obligation for in-scope batteries: Batteries and Accumulators (Placing on the Market) Regulations 2008 and any applicable producer-responsibility duties. Battery standards are voluntary technical evidence routes unless a regulation makes a specific requirement mandatory.
target.zh: 适用电池的强制法律义务：《2008年电池和蓄电池（投放市场）法规》以及任何适用的生产者责任义务。电池标准是自愿技术证据路径，除非法规将特定要求设为强制。
target.zht: 適用電池的強制法律義務：《2008年電池和蓄電池（投放市場）法規》以及任何適用的生產者責任義務。電池標準是自願技術證據路徑，除非法規將特定要求設為強制。

cn.en: China tool and battery evidence does not automatically satisfy UK battery placing-on-market and importer duties.
cn.zh: 中国工具和电池证据不会自动满足英国电池投放市场及进口商义务。
cn.zht: 中國工具和電池證據不會自動滿足英國電池投放市場及進口商義務。

rows.verdict: [INFORMATIONAL] Not UK-ready for cordless tools until the battery pack is assessed for UK battery placing-on-market duties as well as the tool under the applicable UKCA or accepted CE product legislation.
